requirements.description: Tom Anderson is the client responsible for defining platform requirements and vision.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson

requirements.description: Ramesh is a team member responsible for requirement gathering and technical clarification.
requirements.speaker: Ramesh

requirements.description: Platform must support school students, college students, working professionals, and elderly learners.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: All four user groups can register and access platform content successfully.

requirements.description: Platform must support academic, professional skills, and hobby-based course categories.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Courses from all three categories are browsable and enrollable by users.

requirements.description: Instructors must be able to register on the platform as course creators.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Instructor registration form is available and creates a verified instructor account.

requirements.description: Instructors must have access to course creation tools to build and publish courses.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Instructor can create, edit, and publish a course using provided tools.

requirements.description: Instructors must be able to upload video content for their courses.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Instructor can upload video files that are playable by enrolled learners.

requirements.description: Users must be able to browse and search for courses on the platform.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Search returns relevant course results based on keyword input.

requirements.description: Users must be able to enroll in available courses on the platform.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: User can enroll in a course and gain immediate access to course content.

requirements.description: Users must be able to track their learning progress within enrolled courses.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Progress percentage is displayed and updated as user completes course modules.

requirements.description: Users must receive a certificate upon successful course completion.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Certificate is generated and accessible to user after completing all course requirements.

requirements.description: Platform must support both free and paid course enrollment options.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Free courses are accessible without payment; paid courses require successful payment to enroll.

requirements.description: Platform must integrate secure payment processing for paid course purchases.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Payment transaction completes securely and grants user access to purchased course.

requirements.description: Platform must provide personalized course recommendations to users.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Recommendations displayed are relevant to user's enrollment history or profile preferences.

requirements.description: Admin must be able to manage user and instructor accounts on the platform.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Admin can view, edit, suspend, or delete user and instructor accounts.

requirements.description: Admin must be able to approve or reject courses submitted by instructors.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Courses are only published on the platform after explicit admin approval.

requirements.description: Admin must be able to monitor overall platform activity and usage.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Admin dashboard displays real-time platform activity metrics.

requirements.description: Platform must provide analytics dashboards showing user engagement metrics.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard displays active users, session duration, and enrollment trends.

requirements.description: Platform must provide revenue tracking analytics for financial performance monitoring.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Revenue dashboard displays total earnings, transactions, and revenue per course.

requirements.description: Platform must support a multi-role system: Admin, Instructor, and Learner.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Each role has distinct permissions and access levels enforced across the platform.

requirements.description: Platform must scale to support thousands of concurrent users without performance degradation.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Platform maintains acceptable response times under load of thousands of simultaneous users.

requirements.description: Platform must have a simple and intuitive user interface accessible to beginners.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: New users can navigate and enroll in a course without external assistance.

requirements.description: Platform must be mobile-friendly and responsive across devices.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: All core features are fully functional and visually correct on mobile devices.

requirements.description: Payment integration must be secure to protect user financial data.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Payment flow complies with PCI-DSS standards and no card data is stored in plain text.

requirements.description: Courses must be approved by admin before becoming visible and enrollable by learners.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Unapproved courses are not visible in search or browsing results.

requirements.description: Certificates are only issued to users who fully complete all course requirements.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Certificate is not generated until 100% course completion is recorded.

requirements.description: Paid courses require successful payment before granting learner access to content.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Learner cannot access paid course content without a confirmed payment record.

requirements.description: Platform will be web-based, accessible via standard internet browsers.
Instructors are assumed to be independent creators, not exclusively platform-employed staff.
A third-party payment gateway will be used for processing paid course transactions.
Platform will support English as the primary language at initial launch.
Platform must be inclusive and accessible for all age groups including elderly users.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson
acceptance_criteria: Platform meets WCAG 2.1 accessibility guidelines for elderly and beginner users.

requirements.description: Platform design must be comparable in scope to Coursera and Udemy feature sets.
requirements.speaker: Tom Anderson

requirements.description: The system shall display a browsable catalog of all available courses to learners.
acceptance_criteria: Learner can view all available courses in a browsable list or grid view.

requirements.description: The system shall allow learners to search courses using keywords and return relevant results.
acceptance_criteria: Search returns relevant courses matching entered keywords within 2 seconds.

requirements.description: The system shall allow learners to enroll in available courses to begin learning.
acceptance_criteria: Learner can click enroll and gain immediate access to course content.

requirements.description: The system shall display course progress tracking showing percentage of completion per learner.
acceptance_criteria: Learner dashboard shows accurate completion percentage for each enrolled course.

requirements.description: The system shall automatically generate and issue a certificate upon course completion.
acceptance_criteria: Learner receives a downloadable certificate immediately after completing all course requirements.

requirements.description: The system shall provide personalized course recommendations based on learner interests and history.
acceptance_criteria: Learner sees at least 5 personalized course recommendations on their dashboard.

requirements.description: The system shall be fully accessible and functional on mobile devices for learners.
acceptance_criteria: All core learner features render and function correctly on iOS and Android devices.

requirements.description: The system shall allow instructors to register and create a verified instructor account.
acceptance_criteria: Instructor can complete registration and access course creation tools upon approval.

requirements.description: The system shall allow instructors to upload videos and documents as course content.
acceptance_criteria: Instructor can successfully upload video and document files that become accessible to enrolled learners.

requirements.description: The system shall allow instructors to edit and update existing published course content.
acceptance_criteria: Instructor can modify course title, description, and content after initial publication.

requirements.description: The system shall provide instructors with a dashboard showing student enrollment counts per course.
acceptance_criteria: Instructor dashboard displays total and per-course enrollment numbers updated in real time.

requirements.description: The system shall process and distribute revenue payments to instructors for paid course enrollments.
acceptance_criteria: Instructor receives correct revenue share payment for each paid enrollment within defined payout period.

requirements.description: The system shall allow admins to create, suspend, and delete user accounts.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can view, edit, suspend, and delete any user account from the admin panel.

requirements.description: The system shall allow admins to approve or reject instructor-submitted courses before publication.
acceptance_criteria: Course is only published on the platform after explicit admin approval action.

requirements.description: The system shall provide admins with real-time monitoring of platform activity and system health.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can view live activity logs including logins, enrollments, and errors in the admin panel.

requirements.description: The system shall provide admins with analytics dashboards displaying platform performance and growth metrics.
acceptance_criteria: Admin dashboard displays KPIs including total users, enrollments, and revenue with trend charts.

requirements.description: The system shall allow admins to view, manage, and reconcile all platform payments and transactions.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can view full transaction history, filter by date and status, and issue refunds.

requirements.description: The system shall process course payments securely using encrypted and compliant payment methods.
acceptance_criteria: Payment is processed via PCI-DSS compliant gateway with SSL encryption and confirmed to user.

requirements.description: The system shall display a complete purchase history for each user account.
acceptance_criteria: User can view a list of all past purchases including date, course name, and amount paid.

requirements.description: The system shall provide secure user registration and login with credential encryption.
acceptance_criteria: User credentials are stored encrypted and login requires valid authentication before granting access.

requirements.description: The system shall allow users to reset their password via a verified email link.
acceptance_criteria: User receives a password reset email with a secure expiring link that allows password update.

glossary.Education4All: The project name for the inclusive online education platform being developed for client Tom Anderson.
glossary.Learner: A registered user who browses, enrolls in, and completes courses on the platform; one of the three primary user roles.
glossary.Instructor: A registered course creator who uploads video content, builds courses, and publishes them for learner enrollment.
glossary.Admin: A platform administrator responsible for managing user accounts, approving courses, and monitoring platform activity.
glossary.Course Catalog: The browsable and searchable collection of all published and approved courses available to learners on the platform.
glossary.Course Approval: The admin-controlled workflow where instructor-submitted courses are reviewed and either approved or rejected before becoming publicly visible.
glossary.Certificate: A digital credential automatically issued to a learner upon successful completion of all requirements within a course.
glossary.Paid Course: A course that requires successful payment processing before a learner is granted access to its content.
glossary.Free Course: A course available for enrollment without any payment requirement.
glossary.Personalized Recommendations: An algorithmic feature that suggests relevant courses to learners based on their interests, enrollment history, and activity.
glossary.Progress Tracking: A feature that displays a learner's percentage of completion within an enrolled course.
glossary.Revenue Tracking: Analytics functionality that monitors financial performance including instructor payouts and platform earnings from paid courses.
glossary.Third-Party Payment Gateway: An external payment processing service integrated into the platform to handle secure transactions for paid course purchases.
glossary.Multi-Role System: The platform architecture supporting three distinct user roles — Admin, Instructor, and Learner — each with different permissions and capabilities.
glossary.Instructor Dashboard: A dedicated interface providing instructors with data on student enrollment counts and course performance metrics.
